ddls:
CREATE TABLE "farm_incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income category */,
  "proportion_of_income_from_dairy" REAL /* Proportion of income from dairy for each category */,
  "avg_income" REAL /* Average income for each category */,
  "num_farms" INTEGER /* Number of farms in each category */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the farms are located */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crops grown */,
  "livestock_type" TEXT /* Type of livestock raised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., subsidy, tax credit) */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was implemented */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Policy ID for the intervention */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Income ID for the intervention */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the intervention (e.g., percentage increase in income) */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention was implemented */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_interventions_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_interventions_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES farm_incomes ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "market_description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "market_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the market (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "market_size" REAL /* Size of the market (e.g., number of farms, acres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Market ID for the data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the data point */,
  "price" REAL /* Price for the data point */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume for the data point */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data point (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "tech_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "tech_description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "adoption_rate" REAL /* Adoption rate of the technology (e.g., percentage of farms using the technology) */,
  "development_date" TEXT /* Date when the technology was developed */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the technology was implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_info" (
  "info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each information point */,
  "info_type" TEXT /* Type of information (e.g., weather, soil quality) */,
  "info_description" TEXT /* Description of the information */,
  "info_value" TEXT /* Value of the information */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., government report, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farmers" (
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farmer */,
  "farmer_name" TEXT /* Name of the farmer */,
  "farm_size" REAL /* Size of the farm */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Income ID for the farmer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the farmer (e.g., high school, college) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the farmer (e.g., number of years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farmers_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES farm_incomes ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy impact */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Policy ID for the impact */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Income ID for the impact */,
  "impact_value" REAL /* Value of the impact (e.g., percentage increase in income) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the impact was evaluated */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to evaluate the impact (e.g., survey, econometric model) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_impact_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES farm_incomes ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_impact_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Market ID for the trend */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the trend */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend (e.g., percentage increase in price) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the trend (e.g., 95% confidence level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technology_adoption" (
  "adoption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology adoption */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Technology ID for the adoption */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Income ID for the adoption */,
  "adoption_rate" REAL /* Adoption rate of the technology (e.g., percentage of farms using the technology) */,
  "adoption_date" TEXT /* Date when the technology was adopted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adoption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technology_adoption_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES farm_incomes ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technology_adoption_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "info_id" INTEGER /* Information ID for the data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the data point */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., government report, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_data_info_id FOREIGN KEY ("info_id") REFERENCES other_info ("info_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., policymaker, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID for the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
